creator: abc@ai1.alaska.net
text:
There are no config-recursive options for the port.
So, these problems occur after 'make install':
$ xpaint
No help file found !!
!! No messages found !!
!! No messages found !!!! No messages found !!!! No messages found !!!! No messages found !!Brush configuration file
  /usr/local/share/xpaint/bitmaps/brushbox.cfg
couldn't be read !! Will use square 9x9 as the brush ...
Logic error: file-format string "Auto_Detect" not found in msgText
Logic error: file-format string "PNG_Format" not found in msgText
Logic error: file-format string "GIF_Format" not found in msgText
Logic error: file-format string "JPEG_Format" not found in msgText
Logic error: file-format string "JP2K_Format" not found in msgText
Logic error: file-format string "PGF_Format" not found in msgText
Logic error: file-format string "TIFF_Format" not found in msgText
Logic error: file-format string "TGA_Format" not found in msgText
Logic error: file-format string "BMP_Format" not found in msgText
Logic error: file-format string "ICO_Format" not found in msgText
Logic error: file-format string "SGI_Format" not found in msgText
Logic error: file-format string "PPM_Format" not found in msgText
Logic error: file-format string "XBM_Format" not found in msgText
Logic error: file-format string "XPM_Format" not found in msgText
Logic error: file-format string "XWD_Format" not found in msgText
Logic error: file-format string "LXP_Format" not found in msgText
Logic error: file-format string "PS_Format" not found in msgText
Logic error: file-format string "PDF_Format" not found in msgText
Logic error: file-format string "TEX_Format" not found in msgText
Logic error: file-format string "CSC_Format" not found in msgText
Running:
pdf2ps "/usr/home/abc/121023-USPS-PA.pdf" "/home/abc/.xpaint/tmp/121023-USPS-PA.ps" 
pdf2ps: not found
Running:
psselect -p1 "/home/abc/.xpaint/tmp/121023-USPS-PA.ps" | gs -sDEVICE=pngalpha -r300.000000 -g2479x3508 -dNOPAUSE -dQUIET -sOutputFile=/home/abc/.xpaint/tmp/XPaint-7qJlSk - -c quit
gs: not found
psselect: not found

Fix: 

Don't know.  I made sure all directories nuder local were 755
and all files were 644, but it didn't help.  The program is
unusable as-is.  The buttons don't display text in the submenus,
and various parts of the program are broken because of missing
dependencies.
How-To-Repeat: make install for xpaint port.
